title: Relay URL not validated at startup: DNS error instead of 'invalid scheme'
description: cli/src/main.rs accepts the relay URL from CLI flag, config file, or default without parsing or validating it. A typo like 'wss://relay.example.comm/ws' (extra m) fails at connect time with a DNS resolution error. A user who puts 'http://' instead of 'ws://' gets a protocol error deep in tungstenite. Neither error points back to the URL as the problem. What would make it clear: parse with url::Url at startup, reject non-ws/wss schemes with an explicit error message before attempting any connection.
close_reason: scheme validation added in cli/src/main.rs before Chat dispatch; actionable error with correction hint
